title: Chapter 24
content:
Chapter 24: Patrick

’The time has come...Sophia interrupted me the last time when I was about to fuck Maria...and I still hold that grudge against her to be repaid in full. Hehe’

’Back to the pussy in front of me, damn...its really tight and clinging to my cock like its been craving for it...and this bitch begging for it just makes it more and more exciting, guess I should tease her a bit more’

Denzel put one hand on his cock and circled it right round Aisha’s pussy

~Anhhnnnn

Aisha let out a loud moan and a wide grin drew on Denzel’s face

"You want my cock" Denzel said while he slid the tip his dick inside her pussy and pulled it right out

"Y-yes please...I-I can’t t-take the wait anymore...fuck me hard p-pleaee!" Aisha screamed out

"Alright, I said I would reward good girl behaviour...you have rightly earned my cock and I’ll fuck you and cum right inside you"

Denzel said

He held his cock and was about to slide it into her pussy before–

THUD!

A loud explosion was heard coming right from outside the house

Denzel stopped mid motion and looked towards the direction of the sound instinctively...same with Aisha

"What’s that sound" Aisha asked

’What the hell is that sound, sounded like an explosion should be worth checking out...under normal circumstances yeah but fucking this bitch now takes priority’

Aisha was moving like she was about to stand up and move towards the door but Denzel grabbed her by the hair and put her in place

"Did I say you could move? You’re becoming a bad girl" Denzel said with a still dominant voice

"B-but the soun–" Aisha tried to speak but Denzel cut in

"I don’t give a fuck about that, I didn’t say you could move or you don’t want this cock ramming your pussy anymore?" Denzel said

"I-I’m sorry...I just wan...I’m sorry" Aisha said as she bent over pointing her plum succulent ass back towards Denzel’s cock

’Sophia interrupted me the last time but this time I’m not stopping...whatever caused that sound has to wait...I’ll fuck this bitch until she passes out’ Denzel thought eager to put his dick back into Aisha’s pussy and then...

Knock knock knock

Three loud bangs were heard on the door before a distressed voice was heard from behind it

"Madam Aisha! You have to come out, please!" The unknown voice said

And just immediately after the door opened a guard came inside panting heavily and after a few seconds of catching his breath, he walked towards the room Denzel and Aisha were in

As he made the turn, he saw Denzel sitting on the table at the right edge of the room and Aisha laying on the bed...both clothed

"What’s the matter and how dare you barge in to my room like that" Aisha looked at the distressed guard and asked

"T-There is...chaos...o-outside" The guard tried to speak

"Chaos? What do you mean, calm yourself and explan" Aisha asked again

The guard took a few long breaths and continued...

"I-It’s Patrick! He came looking for you and we told him you’re not accepting visitors so he got angry and tried to force his way inside..." he paused and took a deep breath before continuing

"...naturally we tried to stop him and he easily overwhelmed us, easily defeating the other two guards with his magic. I knew I couldn’t defeat him so I came to call for you"

"Patrick? Patrick did that? Oh my...that boy" Aisha said

Denzel Just stood there listening to the conversation between the panting distressed guard and Aisha, his thoughts lingering

’Oh my god...what the fuck is this timing. Did I die, reincarnate, get a system to fuck women but then when I’m about to fuck them I inevitably get interrupted?! Am I cursed with a fated attribute that nothing will ever go my way?!’

’Patrick? Who the hell is that...I can’t recall any body of that name from my memories. First was Sophia, one of my targets even and now it’s Patrick...a random NPC I don’t even know...Fuck!’

’And what’s that about magic. I imagined this to be a world of magic but I haven’t really seen any use of it, and they say this Patrick dude used it...that should be interesting to see’

Aisha stood up to go outside following the guards lead and Denzel with curiosity to see the culprit that interrupted his perfect fuck time and also see what this so called magic was about followed behind them

They swung the door open and stepped outside and then they saw the entire view of the current situation

Two guards lay on the ground

One of them was twisting and groaning faintly in pain, clutching the side of his stomach. The other guard was completely still and flat on the floor, knocked out cold.

The entrance area was in disarray with debris scattered everywhere like a fight had just ended a few seconds ago

And standing behind the two guards laying on the floor was something you couldn’t miss...It was a young man around Denzel’s age

He had red hair and red crimson sharp eyes and most remarkably his hands...both of his hands were burning with red flames

It was obvious that he was the culprit named Patrick that not only defeated the guards but interrupted Denzel

’Is this the punk...Patrick? Shouldn’t those flames be burning his hands or...is this the magic...wow that’s amazing’

He wasn’t injured and didn’t look he wanted to retreat...not like he had a need to either way

Denzel’s gaze locked onto him instantly and their eyes met

Patrick’s eyes were intimidating but Denzel wasn’t one to show his weak side by backing off

’You may have magic and be strong enough to easily defeat both of those guards, but I dont care about all of that...anyone who interrupts me or fucks me up like this will definitely get their payback in due time’ Denzel thought

And just then...Patrick lifted his right hand still bursting in flames and pointed it straight at Denzel

His eyes getting sharper and focusing directly at Denzel

"Who the hell are you?"

Patrick said as a small ball of fire shot out from his arm towards Denzel’s direction
